title: Senior Teacher - NIT Warangal - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - NIT Warangal - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIT Warangal. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About NIT Warangal:
NIT Warangal is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Warangal!
